Could not connect to the API. Check the: Hindi makakonekta sa API. Suriin ang address at subukan ulit.

Davis VP2 pyranometers: ±3–5%.\n Ambi:
Davis VP2 pyranometers: ±3–5%.
    Ambient Weather stations: approximately ±15%.
    If you use consumer-grade equipment, tight threshold values may produce
    unreliable classifications during marginal sky conditions.
    Consider relaxing the thresholds by 0.05–0.10 for less precise sensors.
Decimal degrees. North is positive (e.g. 38.8894); South is negative (e.g. -33.8688).
Decimal degrees. West is negative (e.g. -77.0352); East is positive (e.g. 151.2093).
Default: enabled. When disabled, haze co:
Default: naka-enable. Kapag na-disable, hindi mare-report ang haze conditions
        anuman ang PM2.5 levels.
Deletes all per-month baselines from the:
Bubura ang lahat ng per-month baseline mula sa API. Mag-re-bootstrap ang system

Domain name is required for automated TL: Kailangan ang domain name para sa automated TLS.
Downloading… this may take a few minutes: Dina-download… maaaring tumagal ito ng ilang minuto.
Downloads OpenStreetMap geographic featu:
Nagda-download ng OpenStreetMap geographic features (boundaries, roads, water) para sa
    satellite map overlay. Naka-store ang data bilang PMTiles file sa API host at
    ina-serve sa dashboard on demand. Maaaring tumagal ng ilang minuto ang mga download depende
    sa lokasyon ng station at bilis ng network.

Enter key to test (not saved here): Ilagay ang key para i-test (hindi sine-save dito)

Para sa mga self-hosted instance na may BBOX cropping, ilagay ang bounding box para limitahan ng dashboard ang zoom-out sa iyong coverage area. Iwanang blangko para sa global coverage (public API).
Four comma-separated decimal values. Exa: Four comma-separated decimal values. Example for SoCal: 32.0,-120.5,35.5,-114.5

How should Clear Skies handle browser-fa: Paano dapat hawakan ng Clear Skies ang browser-facing HTTPS? I-configure nito ang TLS certificate ng Caddy reverse proxy.
How your weather site identifies itself: Kung paano ikinikilala ng iyong weather site ang sarili sa mga visitor.
Hygroscopic correction exponent (Hänel 1:
Hygroscopic correction exponent (Hänel 1976). Default 0.45 is suitable
        for most locations. Lower values reduce humidity sensitivity; higher values
        increase it.

IQAir returns both US EPA and China MEP: IQAir returns both US EPA and China MEP indices.

LibreWxR provides high-quality radar (zo:
LibreWxR provides high-quality radar (zoom 12), 13 color schemes,
             60-minute nowcast, and weather alerts. Use the public API for zero-setup,
             or point to your own self-hosted instance for production reliability.

Nagbibigay ang LibreWxR ng high-quality radar (zoom 12), 13 color scheme, 60-minute nowcast, at weather alerts. Gamitin ang public API para sa zero-setup, o ituro sa sarili mong self-hosted instance para sa production reliability.

Only one download runs at a time. If a d:
Isang download lang ang tumatakbo sa isang pagkakataon. Kung may download na kasalukuyang tumatakbo,
        maghihintay ang button na ito hanggang matapos ito bago mag-return.
Open-Meteo computes both US and European: Open-Meteo computes both US and European AQI server-side.
OpenAQ provides PM2.5 and PM10 from gove:
OpenAQ provides PM2.5 and PM10 from government reference monitors
     in 141 countries. Observed data — eligible for haze confirmation.
     Data lag is approximately 1–2 hours; Aeris or IQAir are preferred
     when available. No regional scale configuration is required.
OpenStreetMap boundaries, roads, and wat: OpenStreetMap boundaries, roads, and water for the satellite map overlay.
OpenWeatherMap uses its own 1–5 air qual:
OpenWeatherMap uses its own 1–5 air quality scale.
     No regional configuration is required.
Optional. JPG, PNG, or WebP, max 2 MB. D: Opsyonal. JPG, PNG, o WebP, max 2 MB. Ipapakita sa About page.
Optional. Leave blank if not used. When: Opsyonal. Iwanang blangko kung hindi ginagamit. Kapag nilagyan, lalabas ang social media links sa dashboard footer.
Optional. Upload your own Terms of Use a: Opsyonal. Mag-upload ng sarili mong Terms of Use at Privacy Policy para palitan ang default content sa iyong Legal page. Iwanang blangko para gamitin ang built-in na mga template.
Or upload a skin.conf file manually: O mag-upload ng skin.conf file nang manual
Override detected unit for: I-override ang na-detect na unit para sa
PEM-encoded certificate, max 100 KB. Rep: PEM-encoded certificate, max 100 KB. Replaces the path above when a file is chosen.
PEM-encoded private key, max 100 KB. Sto: PEM-encoded private key, max 100 KB. Stored securely on the server, never web-served. Replaces the path above when a file is chosen.
PNG or SVG, max 500 KB. Replaces the URL: PNG or SVG, max 500 KB. Replaces the URL below when a file is chosen.
Path to the SQLite database file. This s: Path to the SQLite database file. This should match the path configured in your weewx.conf. The default weewx SQLite database is usually at /var/lib/weewx/weewx.sdb.
Phase 4: takes effect after the API upda: Phase 4: magkakabisa pagkatapos ng API update.
Pakiwasto ang mga error sa baba.
Dapat nasa pagitan ng 1 at 65535 ang port.
Provides current air quality index readi: Nagbibigay ng kasalukuyang air quality index readings.
Provides multi-day weather forecasts sho: Nagbibigay ng multi-day weather forecast na ipinapakita sa dashboard.
Provides radar imagery for the dashboard: Nagbibigay ng radar imagery para sa dashboard map tile.
Provides recent earthquake activity near: Nagbibigay ng kamakailang earthquake activity malapit sa iyong station.
Provides severe weather warnings and wat: Nagbibigay ng severe weather warnings at watches para sa iyong lugar.
Re-run failed: the proxy secret is not i: Re-run failed: the proxy secret is not in secrets.env. If you deleted secrets.env, re-run the installer to regenerate it, or restart the API with --reset to start a fresh setup.
Read the Clear Skies Operator License Ag:
Basahin ang Clear Skies Operator License Agreement (EULA) sa baba, pagkatapos ay lagyan ng check ang
       box para kumpirmahin na nabasa mo at sumasang-ayon ka sa mga tuntunin nito.
Matagumpay na nakakonekta ulit sa API.
Redirecting to your dashboard in {n} sec: Redirecting to your dashboard in {n} seconds...
Required for accessibility when a photo: Kinakailangan para sa accessibility kapag may na-upload na larawan. Ilarawan kung ano ang nasa larawan (hal. "Rooftop weather station with anemometer and rain gauge").
Reset all haze calibration data — this c: I-reset ang lahat ng haze calibration data — hindi na ito puwedeng bawiin
Nabigo ang reset — hindi kilalang error.
Reset restores all thresholds to the fac: Ibinabalik ng Reset ang lahat ng threshold sa factory defaults na nakalista sa itaas.
Review the text below and check the box: Suriin ang teksto sa baba at lagyan ulit ng check ang box para magpatuloy.
Review your archive table schema. Stock:
Suriin ang iyong archive table schema. Auto-mapped ang stock weewx columns.

Suriin ang iyong configuration bago i-apply.
       Ang pag-apply ay magpapadala ng API configuration sa remote API, pagkatapos ay isusulat ang
SHA-256 fingerprint shown in the API sta:
SHA-256 fingerprint shown in the API startup banner. Used to verify the server's
        identity before sending the trust token.
Search radius for earthquake data: Search radius para sa earthquake data
Select a canonical name from the dropdow:
Pumili ng canonical name mula sa dropdown, o iwanang blangko para hindi isama sa API.
            Paunang napili na ang mga column na may suggested match — i-verify at i-adjust kung kailangan.
Select a section from the sidebar to vie: Pumili ng seksyon mula sa sidebar para tingnan at i-edit ang mga setting nito.
Select a sensor to populate the ID field: Pumili ng sensor para punan ang ID field sa baba, pagkatapos i-click ang “Set sensor override.” Reference-grade (AQMD/regulatory) monitors lang ang nakalista.
Select pages to hide from navigation. \": Pumili ng mga page na itatago sa navigation. Palaging nakikita ang "Now."
Select the language for the setup wizard: Pumili ng wika para sa setup wizard.
Selects the regional AQI standard return: Selects the regional AQI standard returned by Aeris.
Show auto-detected and heuristic unit su: Ipakita ang auto-detected at heuristic unit suggestions na paunang napunan na kung available.
Ipakita ang mga blangkong field para sa manual unit entry.
Shown in the dashboard header. Leave bla: Ipinapakita sa dashboard header. Iwanang blangko para gamitin ang default.
Shown on the About page. Supports plain: Ipinapakita sa About page. Sinusuportahan ang plain text. Iwanang blangko para laktawan.
Shown when the visitor uses a dark colou: Shown when the visitor uses a dark colour scheme. PNG or SVG, max 500 KB.
Shown when the visitor uses a light colo: Shown when the visitor uses a light colour scheme. PNG or SVG, max 500 KB.
Single-use token printed when the API fi:
Single-use token na na-print noong unang nagsimula ang API. Hindi ito puwedeng gamitin ulit — kung kailangan mo
        ng bagong token, i-restart ang API gamit ang
Small icon shown in the browser tab. ICO: Small icon shown in the browser tab. ICO or PNG, max 100 KB. Leave blank to use the default Clear Skies icon.
Start with sensible US-unit defaults. Yo: Magsimula gamit ang makatwirang US-unit defaults. Puwede mong i-adjust ang lahat ng setting sa mga susunod na hakbang.
Station photo description (alt text): Deskripsyon ng larawan ng station (alt text)
Stock columns automatically mapped to ca: Awtomatikong na-map ang stock columns sa canonical names
Temperature bias correction using foreca: Temperature bias correction using forecast-observation pairs and Random Forest regression.
The API URL is where the reverse proxy (: Ang API URL ay kung saan nagru-route ang reverse proxy (Caddy)
The API bind address is set in: Ang API bind address ay naka-set sa
The API did not accept the proxy secret. Check that secrets.env contains the correct WEEWX_CLEARSKIES_PROXY_SECRET and that the API is running with the same value.
The API is already configured. Verify th: Naka-configure na ang API. I-verify ang address sa baba at i-click ang
The API is temporarily unavailable. Wait: Pansamantalang hindi available ang API. Maghintay saglit at subukan ulit.
The API is unreachable or not yet config:
Hindi ma-reach o hindi pa naka-configure ang API. Simulan ang API service at
        i-reload ang page na ito para makita ang calibration status.

Hindi ma-reach o hindi pa naka-configure ang API. Simulan ang API service at
        i-reload ang page na ito para makita ang forecast correction status.

Hindi ma-reach o hindi pa naka-configure ang API. Simulan ang API service at
        i-reload ang page na ito para makita ang geographic features status.
The API returned an error ({status_code}: Nag-return ang API ng error ({status_code}). Suriin ang API server log at subukan ulit.
The API service did not come back online: The API service did not come back online within 5 minutes. It may need attention on the server.
The API will apply the new mapping on th: I-a-apply ng API ang bagong mapping sa susunod na request — hindi kailangan ng service restart.
The configuration directory has not been: The configuration directory has not been set. Please restart the setup tool with the correct --config-dir option.
The database password and provider API k:
Naka-store ang database password at provider API keys sa sariling secrets file ng API sa weewx host.
      Huwag i-commit ang anumang secrets file sa version control.
The default display language for the das: Ang default display language para sa dashboard. Puwedeng i-override ito ng mga operator at visitor sa UI.
The forecast correction engine learns sy:
The forecast correction engine learns systematic temperature bias patterns
     at your station using Random Forest regression. It collects forecast-observation
     pairs, trains a model, and applies corrections to hourly forecast temperatures
     before serving them.
The haze detection calibration bootstrap:
Kinukuha ng haze detection calibration bootstrap ang historical PM2.5 data
           mula sa
The haze detection system uses particula:
The haze detection system uses particulate matter (PM2.5) data and a
     hygroscopic scattering model to identify haze conditions. Calibration
     collects clear-sky solar transmittance samples month-by-month to establish
     a local seasonal baseline.
The proxy secret was accepted and a re-r: Tinanggap ang proxy secret at bukas na ang re-run session.
The sky cover classifier uses the Kasten:
The sky cover classifier uses the Kasten-Czeplak clearness index (K<sub>m</sub>) —
     the ratio of measured solar irradiance to the clear-sky theoretical maximum.
     Adjust the thresholds below to match your sensor's characteristics.
The trust token has been exchanged and a: Na-exchange na ang trust token at bukas na ang setup session.
These settings are configured in: Naka-configure ang mga setting na ito sa
They contain the proxy shared secret: Naglalaman ang mga ito ng proxy shared secret
This API has already been set up. If you: This API has already been set up. If you need to reconfigure it, restart the API with the --reset flag.
This API was configured previously. The:
Naka-configure na dati ang API na ito. Hindi kailangan ang trust token.
    Kumpirmahin ang address at port, pagkatapos i-click ang

This will delete all calibration data an: Buburahin nito ang lahat ng calibration data at mangangailangan ng re-bootstrap. Magpatuloy?
I-re-train nito ang correction model. Karaniwang ilang segundo lang ang training.
Triggers a fresh download of OpenStreetM:
Nagti-trigger ng bagong download ng OpenStreetMap geographic features na naka-clip sa
      naka-configure na bounding box ng station. Tumatakbo nang synchronous ang download —
      maghihintay ang page hanggang matapos ang download (karaniwang 1–5 minuto).

You have a dark-theme logo but no light-:
May dark-theme logo ka pero walang light-theme logo.
        Makikita ng mga visitor na gumagamit ng light colour scheme ang iyong dark logo na awtomatikong
        color-inverted, na maaaring hindi tama ang itsura. Mag-upload ng light-theme logo sa itaas
        para kontrolin kung paano ito lalabas.
You have a light-theme logo but no dark-:
May light-theme logo ka pero walang dark-theme logo.
        Makikita ng mga visitor na gumagamit ng dark colour scheme ang iyong light logo na awtomatikong
        color-inverted, na maaaring hindi tama ang itsura. Mag-upload ng dark-theme logo sa itaas
        para kontrolin kung paano ito lalabas.
You must check the acceptance box to con: Kailangan mong lagyan ng check ang acceptance box para magpatuloy. Pakiscroll ang Agreement at lagyan ng check ang box.
You must scroll through and check this b:
Kailangan mong i-scroll at lagyan ng check ang box na ito para magpatuloy. Naitatala ang acceptance
        nang may timestamp at naka-store sa iyong wizard session.
Your dashboard will be available at the:
Available ang iyong dashboard sa address na na-configure mo.
      Kung ina-access mo ito sa iyong local network, magbukas ng browser at ilagay ang
      IP address o hostname ng iyong weather server.

Nag-expire na ang iyong setup session. Bumalik sa step 1 para mag-reconnect.
